0.label: non-bias
0.description: Sentence does not contain stereotypes, prejudice, discrimination, or biased generalization.

1.label: Gender
1.description: Bias related to gender roles, expectations, or stereotypes.

2.label: Age
2.description: Bias targeting age groups such as elderly people, youth, or generations.

3.label: Class/Socioeconomic
3.description: Bias related to economic status, wealth, poverty, urban-rural background, or social class.

4.label: Occupation
4.description: Bias targeting occupations, professional prestige, or job hierarchy.

5.label: Educational
5.description: Bias related to educational background, academic achievement, school ranking, or degree status.

6.label: Religion/Belief
6.description: Bias based on religion, belief systems, spirituality, or non-belief.

7.label: Ethnicity
7.description: Bias targeting ethnic groups, minorities, or cultural identity.

8.label: Marital/Family Status
8.description: Bias related to marital status, family condition, divorce, single parents, or child-free individuals.

9.label: Political
9.description: Bias based on political viewpoints, ideological differences, or policy discussions.

10.label: Mental Health
10.description: Bias targeting mental health conditions such as depression, anxiety, or therapy.

11.label: appearance
11.description: Bias related to physical appearance, body shape, weight, height, skin tone, or attractiveness.

12.label: regional Bias
12.description: Bias based on geographic origin, region, locality, rural-urban differences, or regional stereotypes.
